content.query:
-- CREATE OR ALTER VIEW [M3_MITBAL] AS

SELECT
  JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cono') AS [company]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.whlo') AS [warehouse]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.itno') AS [item number]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.stqt') AS [on-hand balance approved]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.quqt') AS [on-hand balance for inspection]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rjqt') AS [rejected on-hand balance]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.alqt') AS [allocated quantity - basic u/m]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.aval') AS [allocatable on-hand balance]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plqt') AS [picking list quantity - basic u/m]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.comg') AS [container management]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.almt') AS [allocation method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.stmt') AS [storage method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.spmt') AS [issue method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sttx') AS [note]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.orqt') AS [ordered quantity - basic u/m]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.reqt') AS [reserved quantity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rlqt') AS [reserved quantity to backorder]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.reqp') AS [reserved quantity - planned orders]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.iddt') AS [last receipt date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.oddt') AS [last issue date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.indt') AS [latest physical inventory date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.prdc') AS [priority date selection]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.incd') AS [physical inventory cycle]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.nuin') AS [number of records for physical inventory]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.usye') AS [annual usage]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.avst') AS [average on-hand balance]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.dile') AS [projected on-hand at end of lead time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.resp') AS [responsible]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.buye') AS [buyer]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.suno') AS [supplier]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.whty') AS [warehouse type]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.whsy') AS [warehouse subtype]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.insc') AS [statistics storage group]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.digr') AS [distribution group]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.whsl') AS [location]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sltp') AS [stock zone]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.nus7') AS [number of balance ids]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.tomu') AS [issue multiple]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.whlt') AS [location type]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.pise') AS [warehouse equipment]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plcd') AS [planning policy]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mabc') AS [abc class - manual]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.abcd') AS [abc class - volume]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.abcm') AS [abc method  - volume]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.abfc') AS [abc class - frequency]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.abfm') AS [abc method - frequency]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.acoc') AS [abc class - contribution]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.acom') AS [abc method - contribution]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.prif') AS [priority value]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sody') AS [run-out time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.reop') AS [reorder point]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.opom') AS [reorder point method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ssqt') AS [safety stock]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ssmt') AS [safety stock method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mssq') AS [manual safety stock]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ssda') AS [safety stock unit]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.scgr') AS [service level]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mxst') AS [maximum stock]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mxsm') AS [maximum stock method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mxpc') AS [maximum stock percentage]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.eoqt') AS [order quantity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.eoqm') AS [order policy]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.eqda') AS [order quantity days]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.yeqt') AS [annual demand]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.yeqm') AS [annual demand method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.loqt') AS [minimum order quantity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.moqt') AS [maximum order quantity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.puit') AS [acquisition code]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.suwh') AS [supplying warehouse]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.dpid') AS [period frame]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.prcd') AS [forecast method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.fccm') AS [forecast logic]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.lyqt') AS [fixed annual demand]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.lrye') AS [fixed acquisition requirement]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.pftm') AS [planning time fence]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.lea1') AS [supply lead time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.lea2') AS [inspection lead time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.lea3') AS [transportation lead time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.leat') AS [lead time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.unmu') AS [order multiple]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.svei') AS [multiple supply]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.levl') AS [lowest level]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.levd') AS [lowest level do]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plhz') AS [planning horizon]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.dmfn') AS [demand time fence]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.orty') AS [order type]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.conc') AS [continuous net change]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.satd') AS [safety time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.alqc') AS [quantity controlled allocation]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.oplc') AS [planning method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.msch') AS [master scheduled]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.shcc') AS [distribution/supplier calendar check]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.zcac') AS [zero mark]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.insl') AS [inspection location]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ncca') AS [net change calculation active]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.faci') AS [facility]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.divi') AS [division]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ddex') AS [time phased safety stock exists]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.strl') AS [history storage method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plic') AS [picking list information control]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ppmc') AS [pending planning method change]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mpcd') AS [calculation date - material planning]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mpct') AS [calculation time - material planning]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.dcss') AS [time phased safety stock]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rpop') AS [responsible - planned purchase order]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.bcos') AS [standard cost - warehouse]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.txid') AS [text identity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.dtid') AS [data identity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.dplo') AS [default pack location]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ddlo') AS [default docking location]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.splc') AS [delivery split rule]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.als1') AS [allocate non-approved balance id]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.poot') AS [point of time table]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.stat') AS [status]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.vtcp') AS [vat code - purchase]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.vtcs') AS [vat code - sales]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mnun') AS [main unit of calculation]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.grts') AS [distribution group technology]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sldy') AS [shelf life]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.redy') AS [reinspection days]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sael') AS [sales time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cpcd') AS [ctp policy]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.leaq') AS [quarantine lead time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.scht') AS [scheduled reclassification allowed]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.salm') AS [secondary allocation method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cdyn') AS [cross-dock]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.pafl') AS [fill partly empty locations]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mrqt') AS [minimum remaining quantity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rgdt') AS [entry date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rgtm') AS [entry time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.lmdt') AS [change date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.chno') AS [change number]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.chid') AS [changed by]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.agdy') AS [aging days]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.agho') AS [aging hours]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.lmts') AS [timestamp]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.scpo') AS [supply chain policy]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.seso') AS [seasonal item]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.alun') AS [alternate u/m]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mrpq') AS [mrp quantity on hand]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plnt') AS [planning template]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plid') AS [planning template implementation date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.plit') AS [planning template implementation time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ktex') AS [unpack kit]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.stcw') AS [catch weight - approved on hand balance]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.qucw') AS [catch weight for inspection-on hand bal]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rjcw') AS [catch weight rejected - on hand balance]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.balo') AS [batch allocation]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.diti') AS [distribution table]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rnri') AS [returnable/non-returnable indicator]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.rmsg') AS [returnable message]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.pafi') AS [all partly empty]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.scrq') AS [scan required]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.agda') AS [aging date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ipla') AS [inventory planned]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.surt') AS [surplus stock type]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.agmi') AS [aging minutes]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.bbtm') AS [best before time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.fssq') AS [frozen safety stock]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.insh') AS [inventory sharing]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.ssre') AS [safety stock reason code]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.mocm') AS [mo consolidation method]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.trdt') AS [transaction date]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.iseg') AS [inventory segment]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.remn') AS [reinspection minutes]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.aviq') AS [average issue quantity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.misq') AS [minimum safety stock]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cstq') AS [consignment ohb]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cquq') AS [consignment ohb inspection]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.crjq') AS [consignment ohb rejected]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cstw') AS [consignment cw ohb]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cquw') AS [consignment cw ohb inspection]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.crjw') AS [consignment cw ohb rejected]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.cslv') AS [consignment stock level]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.amcs') AS [consignment usage rule]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sqcs') AS [seq - supplier usage]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sqc2') AS [seq - supplier usage 2]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sqc3') AS [seq - supplier usage 3]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sqc4') AS [seq - supplier usage 4]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.sqc5') AS [seq - supplier usage 5]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.pote') AS [expiry date table]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.pdln') AS [product line]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.fuba') AS [full balance id control]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.accountingentity') AS [record accounting entity]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.variationnumber') AS [record modification sequence]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.timestamp') AS [record modification time]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.deleted') AS [is record deleted]
, JSON_VALUE (jsonContent, '$.archived') AS [is record archived]

FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/M3/JSON/MITBAL*.json',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b',
        FIELDTERMINATOR ='0x0b',
        ROWTERMINATOR = '0x0a',
        DATA_COMPRESSION = 'GZIP'
    )
    WITH (
        jsonContent varchar(MAX)
    ) AS [result]
